title: Forgoing Oversight of Iran War, G.O.P. Calls Hegseth to Testify on Budget
summary_full: After resisting calls for public hearings for weeks, House Republicans have called the secretary of defense to testify at a budget hearing in late April for the first time since the attacks on Iran began.
summary_public: After resisting calls for public hearings for weeks, House Republicans have called the secretary of defense to testify at a budget hearing in late April for the first time since the attacks on Iran began.

IR.label: neutral
